text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
CODEBOOK: Medicare Part D Medication Therapy Management Enrollment │ May 2024│ V 1.3 3 

CMR_OFFERED 

LABEL: Comprehensive Medication Review (CMR) offered 

DESCRIPTION: This variable indicates whether the beneficiary was offered an annual comprehensive medication 
review (CMR). 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

SOURCE: CMS (HPMS files) 

VALUES: Y = Yes 
N = No 

COMMENT: CMS created the MTM file from information submitted by Part D plan
